title: Tidal Dreams
description: Modpack handcrafted with love that improves the Minecraft experience in almost every way without deviating too much from vanilla
body:
Minecraft modpack handcrafted with love that aims to make Minecraft fun and challenging and add tons of new content without deviating too much from vanilla.
Note: This modpack is in rapid development and mods are changing every update, backup your worlds before updating, the modpack is expected to stabilize around release 2.0

## Documentation and Guides
Documentation and guides for the modpack will be created here https://tidaldreams.miraheze.org/ it is currently a work in progress

## Known Issues
- Nature's spirit trees are not realistic trees see here https://github.com/DynamicTreesTeam/DynamicTrees-NaturesSpirit/issues/4

## List of Features (Not Comprehensive)
(Note: a better list of features has been made in this wiki page https://tidaldreams.miraheze.org/wiki/Feature_List)
- Chance for hidden minerals in stones
- Observe Lag Sources
- Veinmine Ores (You have to crouch then mine)
- Shaders
- Mechanical Contraptions with the Create Mod, Plus Integration with many mods via add-on's 
- Digital Storage with Advanced Energistics 2 including integration with Create Mod via Create: Stock Bridge and Create: Applied Kinetics
- New Blocks and Block Variations via Handcrafted and Chipped
- Trade Cycling
- Custom Paintings
- New Biomes and Terrain in Overworld, Nether and End 
- Vanilla Friendly Ships
- Vanilla Friendly Aircraft
- New Villages and new modded villagers
- Better Combat System and Combat Roll
- New Structures and Revamped existing Structures
- Realistic Trees
- Thirst, Stamina, Hunger, and Body Temperature
- Seasons
- New Crops and New Food and even custom sandwiches
- Food Spoiling
- Right-Click Harvest
- Better Blur Effect
- EMI Recipe Viewer 
- More Creepers
- Smarter Skeletons
- Performance Optimizations
- Easy Building
- 3D Skin Layers
- Easy Elytra Takeoff, New Elytra dyes and trims, Curios Slot for Elytra
- Gravestones
- Advanced Netherite
- Backpacks
- Connected Textures and PBR textures
- Copycat Blocks
- Dynamic crosshair
- Overhauled Anvils and Enchanting Tables and a new enchanting infuser block
- Realistic Visuals such as blood when you take damage and Cooler explosions
- Enhanced First Person
- Ring a bell in your offhand when you are fishing and fish is on the line
- Guard Villagers
- Cozy and Fancy Beds
- Hang Glider
- Campfire Heals you and keeps mobs away
- More pillager variants
- Improved Sign Editing
- Inventory Sorting
- Item Physics
- Legendary Tooltips
- More variants of several blocks
- Magnum Torch
- Fixed the annoying model gap fix
- More info when crashing
- Particle interactions and rain
- Improved sounds
- Highly wanted vertical slabs
- Sleep overhaul bedbugs nightmares and more
- Mob spawn animations
- Status effect display overhaul
- Little Animations in the inventory
- Animation when switching between Hotbar slots
- Sawmill
- Items Stay in crafting table and visually appear
- Hotbar Weapons and tools visible on your skin
- Waystones with Fresh Textures
- Minimap and World Map
- Natural Spawning Bridges in the World
- Identify Block In Sight
- Raised Hotbar 
- Global Datapacks 
- New Mob and Player Animations
- Get damaged by dangerous blocks like stonecutter
- New tools and armor with silent gear
- Overhauled Inventory via the Inventorio mod
- Each player can get separate loot from a chest ensuring everyone gets the loot via the Lootr mod
## Roadmap
Nothing Currently Planned
